bns:Component.name: HROpsConsole - Get Compliance
bns:Component.bns:description: Returns all compliance alerts including overdue training, missing acknowledgments, and documentation gaps

message.msgTxt: '{"summary":{"overdueTraining":8,"missingAcknowledgments":3,"missingDocumentation":1,"totalAlerts":12,"employeesAffected":5},"items":[{"id":"COMP-001","type":"Training","category":"Mandatory","title":"Annual Harassment Prevention Training","employeeId":"E002","employeeName":"Priya Training","employeeId":"E002","employeeName":"Priya
